latestRelease.name: v0.3.147
latestRelease.body:
## What's changed

- Updated to parity with Claude Code v2.1.147

## Update

```sh
npm install @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.3.147
# or
yarn add @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.3.147
# or
pnpm add @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.3.147
# or
bun add @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.3.147
```

latestRelease.name: v0.2.84
latestRelease.body:
### Internal/Other Changes

- Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.147


---

**PyPI:** https://pypi.org/project/claude-agent-sdk/0.2.84/

```bash
pip install claude-agent-sdk==0.2.84
```
